'''Laseel''' was a [[Temperature/Legends|hot]] [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Dathomir system/Legends|Dathomir system]],<ref name="TEA" /> located in the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Laseel had two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] and occupied the third [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Domir/Legends|Domir]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Laseel was first mentioned in ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'', a [[2004]] sourcebook for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', published by [[Wizards of the Coast]].<ref name="GatORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> The [[2009]] book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the world in grid square O-6.<ref name="TEA" />
